reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
A quiet place to stop along the way and enjoy their sandwiches. Especially the homemade matambre.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2trNVVUQnNOM3BLUkdJek5VWXhWVGR4Y2xSQ01GRRAB

reviews.comment:
No tengo palabras, único, para hacer un camino de regreso o de visita a Buenos, La Plata, con urbano, se destaca por los sándwiches de jamón crudo con manteca (o queso si les gusta). Pidan con pan francés. No se van a olvidar. Mi familia lo completa con unos alfajores "Po" fabricados en La ciudad de Las Flores, no se van a arrepentir.

(Translated by Google)
I have no words for this unique place, a place to visit or return to Buenos Aires. La Plata, with its urban atmosphere, is known for its raw ham sandwiches with butter (or cheese, if you like). Order them with French bread. You won't forget them. My family completes it with some "Po" alfajores made in the city of Las Flores; you won't regret it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xabmVtdFdNMlV4VEVoalJIcFpZWFpITFV4WWVGRRAB
